emails.body: RE: URGENT!!! UBS SCHEDULERS WILL NO LONGER HAVE ACCESS TO EPMI FILES ON MONDAY, FEB 4!!!! UM NOBODY IS TRAINED HERE, WE HAVE HAD EXACTLY ONE DAY'S NOTICE TO PULL THIS TOGETHER!

emails.body: RE: URGENT!!! UBS SCHEDULERS WILL NO LONGER HAVE ACCESS TO EPMI FILES ON MONDAY, FEB 4!!!! I will see what I can do about the cut-over. Until the email this morning, I had been told that we had until Thursday morning. The contingency plan in the east is to have Corry's folks come down and help the estate staff using estate logins. Is this possible for you folks as well. Tom.
